title: Helianthocereus orurensis
taxonomy: Helianthocereus orurensis belongs to the family Cactaceae and is a species of flowering plant. The genus Helianthocereus is part of the subfamily Cactoideae. Cactoideae is a subfamily within the family Cactaceae. Helianthocereus orurensis is native to Chile and is a cactus species. The exact classification may vary depending on the source, but it is generally agreed upon as a member of the Cactaceae family.

Some cacti species are used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, wounds, and skin conditions. However, more research is needed to confirm the effectiveness and safety of using Helianthocereus orurensis in herbal preparations.
